ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the drug */,
  "drug_purpose" TEXT /* Primary purpose of the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the drug */,
  "usage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for using the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the drug */,
  "drug_type" TEXT /* Type of the drug (e.g., oral, injectable) */,
  "atc_code" TEXT /* ATC code of the drug */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the drug */,
  "units_in_stock" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the user */,
  "drug_history" TEXT /* History of drug usage */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patient, doctor, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug the review is about */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "period" TEXT /* Duration of drug use */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (1-10) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page number where the review is posted */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Is the review flagged for review? */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the review (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symptom */,
  "symptom_category" TEXT /* Category of the symptom (e.g., physical, mental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_symptoms" (
  "review_symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom reported in a review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "symptom_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the symptom (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_symptoms_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_symptoms_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug interaction */,
  "drug_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first drug in the interaction */,
  "drug_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second drug in the interaction */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the interaction (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_drug_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id_2") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_drug_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id_1") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the user */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_history" TEXT /* History of treatments for the condition */,
  "diagnosing_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who diagnosed the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_medical_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_drug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug usage history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started taking the drug */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user stopped taking the drug */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for changing or stopping the drug */,
  "prescribing_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who prescribed the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_drug_history_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_drug_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new review, comment, like) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
